title: The God’s Knights Move on Elbaf
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Road, Unknown person #5, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Saturn as The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.
scene: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If he didn't...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: PuhaaAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It would've been your head.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: UWAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Daha Ha!!

dialogue.speaker: Road
dialogue.text: Road! Gagya Gya Gya Gya Gya Ryan!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me you picked a fight without checking their current boundaries?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You never stood a chance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't hold back next time!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: GORD- TASO!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's so harsh, I can't get enough!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: C'mon, everyone born here on Elbaf shares the same dream!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to become the next 'sun God' and rule the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Road
dialogue.text: Sun God???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you kidding me?! The sun god isn't a ruler!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's right, he's the God of liberation!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: More like destruction!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're wrong!! Everyone knows he was the god of laughter!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's getting rowdy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What's this about a God?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The Sacred "Harley" texts...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...have been passed down for generations in Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The legends are written in an archaic language, so there have been countless interpretations.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: According to the "Harley" texts, the world has already been destroyed twice before...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the name of Sun God Nika is invoked after each instance.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Nika...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: who can say if he was the world's Savior...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Or the great destroyer who brought it crashing down...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All we know for sure is that he heralds great change!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rulers of the day always tend to fear Nika's return.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's why...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hmm... Nika...

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: ...that's the guy Bonney mentioned...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, the 'sun God' has become a symbol...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Someone the hopeless and desperate turn to for salvation.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They say "Nika" is adorned by white clouds,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With white hair, and white clothes to boot... and he is said to have a contagious, booming laugh.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No wonder everyone's been saying I look similar!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: but I'm sure he's got nothing to do with me!!

summary: This part advances the Loki and the Holy Knights through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
